zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Empson於1540年11月28日之前出生時，他的父親Thomas Empson26歲，母親Agnes Thomas25歲。他於1564年11月5日與Amy Amptyll在布利提申 韋斯特 英迪斯特立尼達及多巴哥維多利亞聖 瑪格麗特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1595年11月24日在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Empson于1540年11月28日之前出生时，他的父亲Thomas Empson26岁，母亲Agnes Thomas25岁。他于1564年11月5日与Amy Amptyll在布利提申 韋斯特 英迪斯特立尼达和多巴哥維多利亞聖 瑪格麗特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1595年11月24日在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Empson was born before 28 November 1540, his father, Thomas Empson, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Thomas, was 25. He married Amy Amptyll on 5 November 1564, in Saint Margaret, Victoria, Trinidad and Tobago, British West Indies. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 24 November 1595, in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England, and was buried in Westminster, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Empson est né avant 28 novembre 1540, son père, Thomas Empson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Thomas, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Amy Amptyll le 5 novembre 1564, à Saint Margaret, Victoria, Trinité-et-Tobago, British West Indies. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1595, à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Westminster, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Empson è nato il prima del 28 novembre 1540, il suo padre, Thomas Empson, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Thomas, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Amy Amptyll il 5 novembre 1564, nel Saint Margaret, Victoria, Trinidad e Tobago, British West Indies. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Empsonが1540年11月28日以前に生まれた時，父Thomas Empsonは26歳，母Agnes Thomasは25歳であった。1564年11月5日にブリティッシュ ウエスト インディストリニダードトバゴヴィクトリアサイント マーガレットでAmy Amptyllと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1595年11月24日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットで死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Margaret's Church, Westminster, Lo: 브리티시 웨스트 인디스 트리니다드 토바고 빅토리아 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Empson(이)가 1540년 11월 28일 이전에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Empson(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Thomas(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1564년 11월 5일 브리티시 웨스트 인디스 트리니다드 토바고 빅토리아 세인트 마거릿에서 Amy Amptyll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1595년 11월 24일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에서 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Empson nasceu antes 28 de novembro de 1540, seu pai, Thomas Empson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Thomas, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy Amptyll em 5 de novembro de 1564, em Saint Margaret, Victoria, Trinidade e Tobago, British West Indies. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1595, em St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Westminster, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Margaret's Church, Westminster, Lo: сеинт маргарет, викторя, Тринидад и Тобаго, бритиш вест индиесь
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Empson родился перед 28 ноябрь 1540 г., его отцу по имени Thomas Empson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Thomas, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Amptyll 5 ноября 1564 г. в местности сеинт маргарет, викторя, Тринидад и Тобаго, бритиш вест индиесь. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 24 ноября 1595 г. в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности вестминстир, глоусестиршир, Англия.
